# Accepted, Deferred, And Rejected Verdicts

`ACCEPTED` means an independent reviewer completed the required scope and KT may rerun the external re-audit attempt lane with the attestation present.

`DEFERRED` means at least one named external gap remains. KT may continue prep-only, shadow, warn-only, bounded pilot, adaptive law, capability implementation, and benchmark preparation under claim ceiling.

`REJECTED` means the reviewed packet should route to forensic external re-audit review.

No verdict in this intake file directly authorizes commercial claims, S-tier, beyond-SOTA, 7B amplification, or truth/trust law mutation.
